rulings.Case Title: MATTHEW HARTMAN VS. RUCHIRA KARAMCHANDANI ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Leave To Augment/Amend Expert Witness List
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, April 9, 2018, Line 1. DEFENDANTS RUCHIRA KARAMCHANDANI, SACHIN KARAMCHANDANI'S Motion For Leave To Augment/Amend Expert Witness List. DENIED. Moving party fails to satisfy the requirements of CCP 2034.610(b) and CCP 2034.610(b) and (c). =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: YOOK C LEE ET AL VS. ROLAND OCHOA ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or, In The Alternative, Motion For Summary Adjudication
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, April 9, 2018, Line 4. PLAINTIFFS YOOK LEE, DOROTHY LEE, SANDRA LEE, JASON LEE'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or, In The Alternative, Motion For Summary Adjudication. DENIED. There is a triable issue of fact as to whether it was the tenant who created and maintained nuisance since the inception of residential tenancy; also triable issue of fact on the unclean hands defense. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JOSEPH YEE VS. QUANG TRAN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate Default Judgment And Recall Writ Of Possession; Memo Of Points And Authorities; Declaration In Support
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, April 9, 2018, Line 5. DEFENDANT QUANG TRAN'S Motion To Vacate Default Judgment And Recall Writ Of Possession. GRANTED. No opposition filed. Answer to be filed forthwith. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DENNIS L. VENTURONI ET AL VS. STEVEN MARTIN ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, April 9, 2018, Line 6. DEFENDANT STEVEN MARTIN'S DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT. OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Service of Notice in accordance with CCP 1161(a)(3) is sufficiently alleged. Whether Plaintiff resorted to service under this provision prior to ascertaining that service under (a)(1) and (a)(2) cannot be accomplished is a question of fact that cannot be properly resolved on a demurrer. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: A-1 PROPERTY MANAGEMENT & INVESTMENTS VS. RAPHAEL M. GOINS ET AL
